source: # Ideogram 4 Cover Generation for D2D Publishing
login()  # Get free token at https://huggingface.co/settings/tokens

('the-genesis-engine', 'The Genesis Engine', 'Middle grade sci-fi book cover. Title The Genesis Engine in bold futuristic font at top. Author Daniel Ryan at bottom. Central image: a massive engineered fungal spore pod on Mars surface with Earth visible in orange sky. Red Martian landscape. Clean, bold, cartoonish. 1600x2400.'),

('the-martian-spore', 'The Martian Spore', 'Middle grade sci-fi book cover. Title The Martian Spore in bold futuristic font at top. Author Daniel Ryan at bottom. Central image: cracked Martian soil with glowing green fungal mycelium spreading. Warning signs planted. Clean, bold, cartoonish. 1600x2400.'),

('the-crimson-bloom', 'The Crimson Bloom', 'Middle grade sci-fi book cover. Title The Crimson Bloom in bold futuristic font at top. Author Daniel Ryan at bottom. Central image: massive crimson-red fungal bloom spreading across Mars viewed from space. Spiral pattern. Clean, bold, cartoonish. 1600x2400.'),

('sporefall', 'Sporefall', 'YA sci-fi horror book cover. Title Sporefall in distressed font at top. Author Daniel Ryan at bottom. Central image: terrifying fungal fruiting body in rainforest canopy releasing spores. Research camp below with fleeing figures. Dark, atmospheric, stylized. 1600x2400.'),

('mycelial-tide', 'Mycelial Tide', 'YA sci-fi horror book cover. Title Mycelial Tide in distressed font at top. Author Daniel Ryan at bottom. Central image: wall of mycelium consuming a city street like a tidal wave. Cars and buildings overtaken. Dark, atmospheric, stylized. 1600x2400.'),

('mycelial-earth', 'Mycelial Earth', 'YA sci-fi horror book cover. Title Mycelial Earth in distressed font at top. Author Daniel Ryan at bottom. Central image: Earth from space with continents covered in glowing fungal mycelium. Small spaceship approaching. Dark, atmospheric, stylized. 1600x2400.'),

('the-salami-saboteur', 'The Salami Saboteur', 'Middle grade mystery/humor book cover. Title The Salami Saboteur in playful font at top. Author Daniel Ryan at bottom. Central image: hand-drawn style ginger cat in black mask sneaking away with enormous salami. Girl with glasses and bulldog looking shocked. Doofus dog has X-eyes. Doodle style like Diary of a Wimpy Kid. 1600x2400.'),

('the-glass-vaults-gambit', 'The Glass Vaults Gambit', 'Middle grade mystery/humor book cover. Title The Glass Vaults Gambit in playful font at top. Author Daniel Ryan at bottom. Central image: hand-drawn style shopping mall at night with security laser grid through skylight. Ginger cat in black turtleneck in air duct. Girl with glasses and bulldog peeking. Doodle style. 1600x2400.'),

('station-zero', 'Station Zero', 'YA sci-fi book cover. Title Station Zero in bold futuristic font at top. Author Daniel Ryan at bottom. Central image: derelict space station in deep space with single blinking light. Small shuttle approaching. Clean sci-fi aesthetic. 1600x2400.'),

('the-echo-chamber', 'The Echo Chamber', 'YA sci-fi thriller book cover. Title The Echo Chamber in bold tech-thriller font at top. Author Daniel Ryan at bottom. Central image: human face reflected in screen but reflection is AI avatar. Glitch effects, data streams, social media icons. Tech-thriller aesthetic. 1600x2400.'),

('the-silent-strata', 'The Silent Strata', 'YA sci-fi book cover. Title The Silent Strata in bold futuristic font at top. Author Daniel Ryan at bottom. Central image: cross-section of Earth crust with dark layers. Ancient alien structure glowing in deepest layer. Tiny drill approaching. Clean sci-fi aesthetic. 1600x2400.'),
for slug, title, prompt in covers:
result = pipe(prompt=prompt, width=1600, height=2400, num_inference_steps=20, guidance_scale=7.5)
